item.title: Parallel 宣布与 Google Cloud 合作，在 Gemini 企业代理平台上提供代理 Web 搜索
item.summary: Parallel (parallel.ai), the company building search infrastructure for the agentic web, announced product integration with Google Cloud that brings Parallel’s agentic web search to Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. Parallel is now natively available across the platform: callable in the Gemini Enterprise API, selectable
